item_text: if login fails: server -> client — type=association; label="login failed"; explanation="server returns error message"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-login-002 title: failed login due to incorrect password module: login source pages: 2 preconditions: user has registered as a client. test data: username: testclient, password: wrongpassword test steps: 1. enter username "testclient" in the login form. 2. enter password "wrongpassword" in the password field. 3. click the login button. expected result: the system should display an error message indicating incorrect login credentials.

item_text: if login succeeds: server -> client — type=association; label="login success"; explanation="server returns user data"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-login-001 title: successful login as client module: login source pages: 2 preconditions: user has registered as a client. test data: username: testclient, password: testpassword test steps: 1. enter username "testclient" in the login form. 2. enter password "testpassword" in the password field. 3. click the login button. expected result: the system should return the user data and allow the user to access the application.

item_text: new product has a decision node with two branches: "push" and "in app notification"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-productmodification-003 title: add product with correct fields module: product addition source pages: 4 preconditions: user is logged in as a vendor. test data: product name: new product, price: 19.99, description: this is a new product. test steps: 1. click the "add product" button. 2. fill in the product details: name, price, description. 3. click the "add" button. expected result: the system should add the product and display a confirmation message.
